message:
fix(agentmail): retry on transient busy and reconcile partially-created agents (#97)

Agent Mail's create_agent_identity can return "busy" errors when the
operation partially completes (agent created but response fails). This
caused spawn/coordination to treat these as hard failures, leaving
agents unregistered even though they existed server-side.

Changes:
- Add ErrTransientBusy sentinel and detection in mapJSONRPCError
- Add callToolWithBusyRetry with exponential backoff (500ms/1s/2s)
- CreateAgentIdentity now retries up to 3 times on busy errors
- registerSpawnedAgents reconciles busy failures by listing agents
  and matching on program/model to find the created-but-unreported agent
- Wire up registerSessionAgent() during spawn so agent.json is created,
  fixing "Session has no Agent Mail identity" errors in ntm lock
- Increase CreateAgentIdentity caller timeout from 3s to 15s to
  accommodate retry backoff

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
